name: Hendvar's Enchanting Tools
description: Portable enchanting station — a toolkit rather than a fixed station.

name: Whetstone of Keen Edge
effect: 1/rest.

name: Everlasting Blue Candles
description: Candles that do not burn down.

name: Boots of the Tireless North
description: Soft leather, northern make, clan stitching along the ankle. Worn looking but perfectly preserved. Sized for small feet.
effect: No movement penalties in difficult terrain (snow, ice, mud, rubble). Travel pace never causes exhaustion regardless of distance covered in a day.

name: Blackwood Wand Focus
description: Blackwood wand usable as a spellcasting focus.
effect: +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC.

name: Hand Crossbow +2 (Rooting)
effect: Once per turn on a hit: choose to deal damage as normal OR root target in place until end of their next turn.

name: Boots of Speed
effect: Double movement speed as bonus action. Opportunity attacks have disadvantage while active.

name: Green Cloak of Presence
effect: Advantage on Persuasion and Performance checks. Once per day: hold a room.

name: Ioun Stone of Mastery
effect: Proficiency bonus increases by 1 while attuned.

name: Cloak of Unremarkability
effect: Wearer becomes visually uncompelling — the eye slides past without focusing.

name: Wand of Secrets
effect: Detects secret doors and traps within 30ft.

name: Coin of Truth
effect: Ask yes/no questions. Always truthful.

name: Eight Unknown Coins
notes: Large gold coins, unfamiliar crest. Not Fynesmarch minting.

name: Ring of Free Action
effect: Unaffected by difficult terrain, movement speed reduction, and paralysis.

name: Belt of Giant Strength
effect: Sets STR to 27.

name: Greatsword +3
effect: On a critical hit: target makes a STR saving throw or is knocked prone.

name: Ceremonial Horn
effect: Functions as both drinking vessel and musical instrument.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
effect: Resistance to cold damage. Move across icy surfaces without penalty. Withstand extreme cold.

name: Paired Shortsword
notes: Resonance only works with Pirra's paired sword.

name: Dagger of Swift Strike +1
effect: Once per turn on a hit: immediately make a second strike with this dagger as part of the same attack, without using a bonus action.

name: Cloak of Arachnida
effect: Spider climb. Immunity to web. Cast Web 1/day.

name: Cold Dagger +2
effect: Deals cold damage. On hit: +1d6 cold damage and target's movement reduced by 10ft until start of their next turn.

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
effect: Reaction when hit by ranged attack: reduce damage by 1d10 + DEX. If reduced to 0, catch the missile.

name: Alchemical Heavy Crossbow
effect: Fires custom alchemical bolts. Quieter release.

name: Alchemical Heavy Crossbow (party copy)
effect: Fires custom alchemical bolts. Quieter release.

name: Shield of Retribution
effect: When bearer is hit by melee attack, attacker takes 1d6 force damage.

name: Bracer of Steady Aim
effect: +1 ranged attack. Advantage on concentration saves after taking damage.

name: Wand of Wonder
effect: Cast random magical effect using charges.

name: Warding Vambrace
notes: Once per day situational damage reduction.

name: Gloves of Spellcasting
effect: Every spell cast treated as one level higher automatically.

name: Elemental Resistance Robes
effect: Resistance to one element chosen on attunement. Attuned to: fire.

name: Staff of Evocation
effect: Adds bonus damage to evocation spells.

name: Rapier +2 (Psychic)
effect: On a hit: choose to deal psychic damage instead of piercing.

name: Concentration Robes
effect: Easier concentration checks.
notes: Superseded by Robe of Archmagi. Stored.

name: Ring of Impact
effect: Stops a harsh impact once per day.

name: The Lexicon
effect: Spell save DC +2. Once per long rest when casting 3rd level or higher: cast as if one level higher without expending the higher slot.

name: Robe of the Archmagi
effect: +2 spell DC and attack, advantage on saves against spells, AC 15 unarmored.

name: Cloak of Protection +2
effect: +2 AC and saving throws.

name: Waive
effect: Whenever bearer casts a healing spell, all other creatures within 15ft are healed for 2hp.

name: Shield of Expression
effect: Display any image or symbol on shield face.

name: Amulet of the Devout +2
effect: +2 spell attack and spell save DC.

name: Medallion of Concentration
effect: Advantage on all concentration checks.

name: Paired Shortsword
notes: Resonance only works with Denna's paired sword.

name: Gloves of Thievery
effect: Invisible while worn. +5 Sleight of Hand and lockpicking.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
effect: Breathe underwater. Swim speed 60.

name: Sword of Sharpness
effect: On a roll of 20: severs a limb and deals extra 14 damage.

name: Cloak of Protection +2
effect: +2 AC and saving throws.

name: Mithral Half Plate +2
effect: No stealth disadvantage.

name: The Farreach (A)
effect: Advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of paired ring. +1d6 force damage. Once per day: responsive bonus to ability or skill check.

name: Longbow +2 (Force)
effect: Deals force damage instead of piercing.

name: Bow Grip
effect: Reduces moving shot penalty.

name: The Farreach (B)
effect: Advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of paired ring. +1d6 force damage. Once per day: responsive bonus.

name: Hat of Perception
effect: +1 passive perception. Advantage on Perception in dim light or darkness.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
effect: Advantage on Stealth checks outdoors. Color shifting.

name: Rope of Climbing and Entanglement
effect: 60ft rope, animates on command. Restrain target 1/day.

name: Belt of Constitution
effect: Sets CON to 18.

name: Robe of Stars
effect: Cast Magic Missile at 5th level using charges. +1 saving throws. Planewalk to Astral Plane.

name: Staff of Power
effect: Cast from charges: Magic Missile, Ray of Enfeeblement, Fireball, Lightning Bolt, Cone of Cold, Hold Monster, Wall of Force, Globe of Invulnerability. +2 spell attack and DC.

name: Wand of Web
effect: Cast Web using charges.

name: Circlet of Scorching Ray 3
effect: Cast Scorching Ray 3 times per day.

name: Halberd of Warning
effect: Cannot be surprised, advantage on initiative. Wakes wielder if danger approaches during sleep.

name: Longsword +2 (Bronze Flame)
effect: Command word ignites bronze edges — adds 2d6 fire damage to each hit while active.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
effect: Sets STR to 19.

name: Cloak of Protection +1
effect: +1 AC and saving throws.

name: Circlet of Mental Fortress
effect: Advantage on INT, WIS, CHA saving throws. Resistance to psychic damage.

name: Amulet of Health
effect: Sets CON to 19.

name: Bone Ring of Weapon Retention
effect: Cannot be disarmed.

name: Bracers of Defense +2
effect: +2 AC when not wearing armor or shield.

name: Elemental Resistance Robes
effect: Resistance to one element. Attuned to: fire.

name: Ring of Transmutation
effect: 1 charge: Alter Self. 2 charges: Polymorph (self only). 3 charges: Gaseous Form.

name: Ring of Jumping
effect: Jump distance tripled.

name: Gloves of Soul Catching
effect: On unarmed strike hit: deal extra 2d10 psychic damage. Choose to regain HP equal to psychic damage dealt OR gain advantage on one roll.

name: Bracers of Striking +2
effect: +2 to unarmed strike attack and damage rolls.

name: Monk's Belt
effect: Adds CON modifier to unarmored AC in addition to DEX and WIS.

name: The Weaver's Master-Awl
description: A simple ancient bone-handled leatherworking awl. The needle-point glows with a faint psionic violet hue.
effect: Four properties: (1) Psionic Reinforcement — Psychic Blades +2 attack and damage. (2) Tactical Foresight — Help targets two allies. (3) Grandmaster's Stitch — infuse leather item during long rest. (4) The Retired Special — once per day reaction pull ally up to 15ft.

name: Stormsplit
notes: Dual form is one weapon not two benefits.

name: Medium Armor
notes: Chain shirt — superseded by Half Plate +2. Stored.

name: Half Plate +2 (Lightning)
effect: Resistance to lightning and thunder damage.

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
effect: Cast Magic Missile using charges.

name: Returning Spear +2
effect: Returns to hand after thrown. On crit: target knocked prone regardless of size.

name: Curved Blade +2
effect: On a critical hit: deals 2d6 slashing damage instead of doubling dice.

name: The Steadfast
effect: Reaction when ally within 30ft drops to 0hp: grant 1d8 + proficiency bonus temp HP. Advantage on death saving throws.

name: Greatsword +2
notes: Return to Corwin or party pool.

name: Belt of Giant Strength
effect: Sets STR to 21.

name: Cloak of Invisibility
effect: Become invisible for up to 1 hour per day.

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
effect: Each bead cast once per day. Rolled spells: Bless, Greater Restoration, Cure Wounds, Wind Walk.

name: Helmet of Proof
effect: Immunity to charm and fear.

name: Amulet of Poison Immunity
effect: Complete immunity to poison while worn.

name: Full Plate +2 (Grey-Green)
effect: Resistance to lightning and thunder damage.

name: Maul +2
effect: On a critical hit: target is knocked prone.

name: Bracers of Swiftness
effect: +10ft movement speed. Dash as bonus action once per short rest.

name: Ring of Spell Storing (5 levels)
effect: Cone of Cold L5
notes: Holds up to 5 levels worth of spells. Any creature can cast stored spell.

name: Ring of Spell Storing (3rd level)
effect: Haste
notes: Holds one spell up to 3rd level.

name: Bracers of Spell Storing
effect: Mass Cure Wounds L5

name: Grip Wrap +1 (Vaz — Rapier)
effect: +1 to hit with wrapped weapon.

name: Grip Wrap +1 (Kessara — Rapier)
effect: +1 to hit with wrapped weapon.

name: Grip Wrap +1 (Rhuna — Greatsword)
effect: +1 to hit with wrapped weapon.

name: Simple Spear
notes: Hasn't used offensively in fifteen years.

name: Scroll of Thunderstorm
effect: Single use. Large area lightning damage.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
effect: Reading takes 48 hours over 6 days. INT score and maximum increase by 2. Becomes mundane for 100 years afterward.

name: Boots of Speed
effect: Double movement speed as bonus action. Opportunity attacks have disadvantage while active.

name: Ring of Spell Turning
effect: Advantage on saves against spells targeting only you. On natural 20, spell reflected back at caster.

name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
effect: +2 CON. Advantage on CHA checks with dwarves. Darkvision 60ft. Resistance to poison, advantage on poison saves.

name: Goggles of Night
effect: Darkvision 60ft. If already have darkvision, extends by 60ft.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
effect: Sets STR to 19.
notes: Unassigned. Corwin already has a pair.

name: Helm of Brilliance
effect: 6 opals cast Daylight. 9 rubies cast Fireball. 5 diamonds cast Wall of Light. Undead within 30ft have disadvantage on attacks. On 1 in sunlight: explodes.

name: Scroll of Ice Storm
effect: Cast Ice Storm at 4th level. Single use.

name: Scroll of Mind Whip
effect: Cast Mind Whip at 2nd level. Single use.

name: The Right Arm
appearance: Ancient wood of unknown origin, warm to touch. Living moss covers most of the surface. Small flowers bloom and die on their own schedule. Insects appear occasionally that have no business being wherever the bearer currently is.

modes.name: Spellcasting Focus
modes.description: Spell save DC +2. Once per long rest: cast any spell without expending a slot.

modes.name: Melee Weapon
modes.description: +3 quarterstaff. Automatically deals most harmful damage type to target. Once per short rest on hit: vines root target until end of their next turn.

modes.name: Wildshape Enhancement
modes.description: Staff merges into non-halfling forms. While merged: +3 attack and damage, HP maximum increases by druid level, once per wildshape cast a cantrip as bonus action. In Stars form the staff remains physical.

notes: Tackett refers to it as his right arm. Offered by the Trevash delta spring after Tackett destroyed the ancient spirit corrupting it.

name: Shadowgrain Leather
effect: Always +1 to AC. Additional +1 to AC while in dim light or darkness, for a total of +2.
notes: Commission from Torrin Gallowglass. Dark green-brown leather, forest floor coloring, grain patterns that shift with the light. Melds into wildshape forms per druid rules — AC bonus applies in halfling form only. Torrin's signature: made for someone who knows how to use shadow.

name: Helm of Carix
effect: Immunity to charm and fear. Once per day when wearer does something that genuinely surprises an enemy, gain advantage on next attack roll.
notes: Commission from Torven forge. Grey-green matching Full Plate +2. Carix's coin standing on edge worked into forehead in subtle relief. The metal was listening when it was made.

name: Helm of the Reaching Hand
effect: Advantage on Insight checks. Once per day as a reaction when an ally within 30ft makes a death saving throw, grant them advantage on it.
notes: Commission from Torven forge. Amber gold with storm-grey inlay. Veleth's two hands almost touching worked into temple pieces. The metal kept trying to become something it hasn't become yet — the smith let it.

name: Helm of the Open Eye
effect: Darkvision extended by 30ft. Advantage on saving throws against being blinded or deafened.
notes: Commission from Torven forge. Dark metal with green-gold veining matching Kerra's eyes. An open eye worked into the brow — no deity symbol, the metal didn't want one. It wanted a window.

name: Headband of Intellect
effect: Sets INT to 19.

name: Green Fey Armor
effect: Counts as half plate (AC 15 + DEX mod max 2). Appears revealing but magical protection extends invisibly for full coverage. +1 CHA while attuned. Only Enauweyn can attune to this item.
description: Green armor of fey construction. Revealing in appearance but the magical protection extends invisibly — coverage is complete. Luxurious flowing cloth around legs and sleeves gives a mystical quality. The green deepens or lightens subtly with her mood.

name: Ring of the Fallen Star
effect: Once per dawn: cast Starfall (see homebrew spells). Spell save DC uses wearer's spell save DC. Additionally, advantage on Perception checks made in darkness or starlight.
notes: Forged from meteorite iron by a civilization that no longer exists. Warm to the touch regardless of temperature. Constellation patterns visible in the metal only in darkness or starlight. Responds to celestial/star magic.

name: Yetgrese Throwing Sword +2
effect: Returns instantly to thrower's hand after a thrown attack, whether it hits or misses.
notes: Saltborn steel — no mechanical effect, flavor only.

name: Sending Stones
description: Paired stones. Cast Sending once per day between them. Unlimited range.
notes: One stone for Taenya Sorreval, one retained by party for cross-ocean communication.

name: Hlifar'dhe'gar
description: Shield that transforms into a construct guardian via command words. Command word to materialize: viel'bi-ra. Command word to dematerialize: chk'TO. Construct HP 142, AC 17. Intercepts damage to attuned wearer. Stores one spell up to 4th level.
notes: Named by Jaygar. Two points of light function as eyes. Previous owner never named it. Ssivanak kept it three years waiting for right owner.

name: Robe of the Tide
description: When wearer casts a spell dealing cold, lightning, or thunder damage, add 2d6 of same damage type once per turn. Wearer can breathe underwater and has swimming speed equal to walking speed.
notes: Made from local Yetgrese materials. Iridescent fabric that shifts with movement. Not available in Aethermoor.

name: Robe of Stilled Thought
description: One concentration spell cast while wearing this robe does not require concentration — it runs for its full duration or until dismissed. Only one spell benefits at a time. Casting a second concentration spell ends the first immediately.
notes: Made by Ssivanak herself. Significant item — effectively frees concentration slot while one spell runs autonomously.

name: Bracers of Spell Mastery
effect: +2 to spell save DC.
notes: Intended for Elucyne to enhance Fear and other save-based spells.

name: Evocation Spellbook
description: Heavily annotated working spellbook with evocation and transmutation focus. Contains: Fly, Haste, Wall of Stone, Chain Lightning. Extensive marginalia throughout.
notes: Intended for Lenn on the other ship. Previous owner thought extensively on the page.

name: Scroll of Control Water
effect: Cast Control Water (level 4). Single use.
notes: Immediately relevant for ocean travel and combat.

name: Scroll of Lightning Bolt
effect: Cast Lightning Bolt (level 3). Single use.
notes: Included free by Ssivanak to close the deal.

name: Scroll of Greater Invisibility
effect: Cast Greater Invisibility (level 4). Single use.

name: Scroll of Plane Shift
effect: Cast Plane Shift (level 7). Single use.
notes: Given free by Ssivanak in exchange for Jaygar identifying it. Inscription was deliberately damaged by previous owner to obscure contents.

name: Scroll of Sending
effect: Cast Sending once. Deliver a 25 word message to any creature on the same plane. Target can reply.
notes: Received as part of Ssivanak's Stillwater reward.

name: Scroll of Counterspell
effect: Cast Counterspell once. Interrupt a creature casting a spell of 3rd level or lower automatically. Higher levels require ability check.
notes: Received as part of Ssivanak's Stillwater reward.

name: Brooch of Shielding
effect: Resistance to force damage. Immunity to Magic Missile.
notes: Given by Ssivanak as part of Stillwater reward, her choice of item.

name: Planar Binding Stone
material: Deep mountain stone, Durath Iron brackets
condition: Intact, inert. Hairline crack in lower third from planar stress.
appearance: Dense dark grey stone disc, covered on all faces with precisely carved dwarven rune schema. Two sheared Durath Iron bracket mounts on the flat reverse face. No current glow or magical activity.
origin: Ancient dwarven clan work, predating current Duncavel settlement. Installed in the Ven Durath mine to bind a magma elemental to this plane, preventing full transit to the elemental plane.
magical_properties: Dormant. Runes formed a planar binding schema — facilitated a connection between this plane and an elemental plane, anchoring Pyrethon here against planar pull. Inert without an active planar connection to bind. Schema is intact and theoretically functional if a planar connection were provided by someone with sufficient magical knowledge.
historical_significance: One of few surviving examples of ancient dwarven planar binding work. The Durath Iron fittings alone are of significant metallurgical interest to dwarven scholars.
acquired: Day 80, Year 468. Removed from east wall of Ven Durath chamber by Ferghus. Decisive factor in permanently destroying Pyrethon.
notes: The consortium's Hearthstone operation above was designed to cool Pyrethon sufficiently for extraction — the elemental itself, or possibly this disc, was their target. Disc removed before consortium could retrieve it.
